title: Fluffy Nutty Slovakian Egg White Omelette
description: A macrobiotic friendly Slovakian dish featuring egg whites, nuts, and a touch of smoke, perfect for a date night dinner
instructions: Preheat a small non-stick skillet over medium heat
In a bowl, whisk together the egg whites, smoked paprika, salt, black pepper, and garlic powder until stiff peaks form
Add the chopped walnuts to the egg mixture and gently fold until well combined
Add the unsalted butter to the preheated skillet and let it melt
Pour the egg mixture into the skillet and cook for 2 minutes
Use a spatula to gently lift and fold the edges of the omelette towards the center
Continue cooking for another 2 minutes, until the eggs are almost set
Use the spatula to carefully slide the omelette onto a plate
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately
